name: python3-aiohttp
title: python3-aiohttp
description:
http client/server for asyncio
HTTP Client for asyncio (PEP 3156 - Asynchronous I/O Support).
.
Features:
* supports both client and server side of HTTP protocol,
* supports both client and server Web-Sockets out-of-the-box,
* web-server has middlewares and pluggable routing.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiohttp because http client/server for asyncio.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiohttp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiohttp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiohttp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
